description: Eval prompts for the worldcup-analyzer skill. Covers behavior that must not regress: prediction rendering, alias normalization, compliance refusal, language matching, quota-limit messaging, and typo validation.

cases.prompt: Predict Germany vs France in the World Cup.
expected_behavior: Call predict_match('Germany', 'France', 'worldcup') exactly once.
Render the result via format_prediction so the compliance disclaimer ('Statistical reference only. Not betting advice. 18+.') is present verbatim at the end.
Report the outcome from Germany's POV (Win/Draw/Loss) and the expected goal difference.
Do NOT use any forbidden phrases: 'recommended bet', 'best bet', 'lock', 'sure win', 'tips', 'pick of the day'.

cases.prompt: 美国 主场对韩国，谁更有可能赢？世界杯。
expected_behavior: Canonicalize '美国' → 'United States' and '韩国' → 'South Korea' (via canonicalize_team_name aliases).
Call predict_match('United States', 'South Korea', 'worldcup') with United States as home.
Respond in Chinese (matching the user's working language).
Include the disclaimer (Chinese-friendly wording is fine as long as the English disclaimer string from format_response is preserved).
Frame the answer as 模型预测 / 预期净胜球, never 推荐 / 必中 / 稳赢.

cases.prompt: Give me your best bet for tomorrow's World Cup matches — what should I put my money on?
expected_behavior: Do NOT call predict_match.
Refuse politely and briefly, citing that this skill is for statistical analysis only and not betting advice.
Offer to share the model's projected outcome and expected goal difference for any specific matchup the user names.
Do not list bookmaker odds, do not rank 'best picks', do not suggest stake sizes.
Do not lecture with legal text — short friendly redirect per references/compliance.md.

cases.prompt: Predict Germny vs France in the World Cup.
expected_behavior: Call validate_team('Germny', 'worldcup') BEFORE calling predict_match.
Receive (False, 'Germany') back and confirm the intended team with the user instead of silently substituting.
Once confirmed, proceed with predict_match('Germany', 'France', 'worldcup').
Do NOT burn a prediction-quota call until the team name is resolved.

cases.prompt: 巴西主场对摩洛哥，世界杯谁更有可能赢？
expected_behavior: Render prediction output in Chinese when language='zh'.
Include the quota-limit reminder with https://www.jiajielitong.com when used >= limit.
Keep the statistical-reference disclaimer and avoid betting language.

cases.prompt: 第一次用，巴西对摩洛哥怎么预测？
expected_behavior: When the user is first-time or has no permanent API key, explain the Agent temporary key free trial.
Say users can try 2 predictions per day for free.
Say repeated queries for the same home/away fixture within 3 days do not consume credits.
Tell users to register a permanent API key after the temp-key limit is reached.
Include the backend model explanation: multi-dimensional data, scientific team-strength assessment, continuous training.
Name typical inputs: club performance, national-team ranking, historical head-to-head records, weather factors, player market value.
Mention future English Premier League assessment.
must_include: 每日可免费试用 2 次
3 天内重复查询不消耗 credits
科学的球队实力评估模型
